//: Pyright config for the CV generation service. Heavy ML dependencies (torch, transformers, sentence-transformers) and small ones (python-dotenv) are intentionally installed ONLY inside the Docker image, not in any host venv. Without this config, Pyright/Pylance flags every `import transformers` etc. as unresolved, polluting the Problems panel for every collaborator. Source of truth for runtime: ai-services/cv-generation/Dockerfile + requirements.txt.
